narrative:
Montville Twp township has 1,386 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
